answer: Seeds, sunlight, nurturing, vibrant, resilient, thriving. Just as a gardener tends to the seedlings, each noun represents the potential for growth nurtured within. Sunlight symbolizes the warmth and support essential for the journey, while resilience reflects the strength needed to overcome challenges. Thriving encapsulates the ultimate goal, where every effort yields a fruitful outcome. Each element interplays, highlighting the importance of care and perseverance in bringing forth abundance. Supporting a budding plant is akin to guiding the path of a young one, fostering qualities that will bloom into greatness. Nurt
